title: Allow 'Push Date' automations to preserve the item's original specific time (hours/minutes)
excerpt:
Description
When duplicating an item and using an automation to push the date forward by X days with a specific time, the system currently strips out the original time. We need the ability for the automation to push the …

posts.author: caroline4 (caroline dubois)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When duplicating an item and using an automation to push the date forward by X days with a specific time, the system currently strips out the original time. We need the ability for the automation to push the date but keep the exact initial time intact, which is critical for accurate Calendar views

When using an automation every days at 12h03 create an item and push due date by X days, then the 12h03 time sticks the following day. This way in the calendar view the created items are shown at the specific time.

What are you trying to achieve

keeping the exact initial time intact of an item while pushing the dates.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @caroline4

I tested this and this only seems to be the case with the automations pre 2026. If you recreate the automation today using the automation builder (not a recipe) it will keep the time component.
